reasoning: The item is an integrated RF transceiver IC (Category 3, Electronics). Because it exceeds even the high-performance 3A001 ADC thresholds (well above the lower AT-only basket levels in 3A991.c, e.g. 12-bit >105 MSPS), the item is captured by the specific Wassenaar-controlled 3A001.a.5 entry and is not an EAR99 or catch-all item.
